overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from GTA V showing a drive through a wet residential neighborhood. The camera follows a pedestrian before crossing an intersection where a red sports car passes, continuing down palm-lined streets with reflective wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street corner with parked vehicle

agents.ego_description: driving forward along the wet street approaching an intersection, following a pedestrian walking on the left side

notable_agents.action: elderly person in blue jacket walking along the sidewalk ahead of the camera
silver SUV parked along the curb with headlights off

entered.detail: single-story white house with illuminated windows behind a fence
white garbage bag sitting on the wet pavement in the middle of the street
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street
tall street lamp post casting yellow light on the wet road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet residential street at night, following an elderly pedestrian in a blue jacket. A white house with illuminated windows sits on the left, while palm trees line the right. A silver SUV is parked along the curb, and a white trash bag lies in the street. The camera moves steadily forward toward the approaching intersection.

events.description: exiting the residential block and entering the open intersection
red sports car drives across the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: continuing through the intersection as a red sports car passes in front

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving at speed across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: multi-story apartment building with many illuminated windows visible across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a wide urban intersection, leaving the residential house and trash bag behind. A tall apartment building with lit windows dominates the view ahead. At approximately 10 seconds, a red sports car speeds across the intersection from left to right. The palm trees now appear on the left as the camera crosses the wet, reflective crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street continuation with parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the intersection, approaching pedestrians on the right sidewalk

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the right sidewalk near a parked car
black sedan parked on the right side of the street near the curb

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera continues down the residential street. The tall apartment building fades into the distance behind. Palm trees now line the right side of the road. A black sedan is parked on the right near a group of pedestrians walking on the sidewalk, visible as the camera approaches the next block.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wet residential neighborhood at night, transitioning from a quiet street through a busy urban intersection and back into a palm-lined residential area. It begins by following an elderly pedestrian in a blue jacket past a white house and a parked silver SUV, moving steadily forward toward a wide crossing. As the camera enters the intersection, the residential scenery gives way to a towering apartment building and a reflective crosswalk, just as a red sports car speeds across the frame from left to right. The scene then shifts back to a quieter street as the apartment building fades into the distance and palm trees return to line the right side of the road. Finally, the camera glides toward the next block, passing a parked black sedan and a group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk.
